# Bel Ağrısı Serisi — Derleme (2026-03-29)

> Bu içerik otomatik derlenmiştir. Tıbbi öneri yerine geçmez; kişisel durumunuz için uzmana danışınız.

## 🔬 Hakemli Makaleler (PubMed)

### Deduction of Back Pain Patients Using EMG Technology and Inertial Sensors During Functional Tests.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik deduction of bel ağrısı patients using emg technology and inertial sensors during fonksiyonal tests. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: sensors (basel, switzerland). 2026 mar 17. Anahtar kavramlar: sensors, deduction, back, ağrı, patients, using.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41902052/

### Pyogenic Spondylitis with Epidural Abscess Caused by Streptococcus suis Serotype 2 ST7: Tissue mNGS Confirmation and Whole-Genome Characterization of a Human Isolate.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik pyogenic spondylitis with epidural abscess caused by streptococcus suis serotype 2 st7: tissue mngs confirmation and whole-genome characterization of a human isolate. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: pathogens (basel, switzerland). 2026 mar 13. Anahtar kavramlar: pyogenic, spondylitis, epidural, abscess, caused, streptococcus.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41901767/

### Phase III Study to Confirm Clinical Similarity of MB09, a Denosumab Biosimilar, and Prolia(®) in Postmenopausal Women with Osteoporosis (SIMBA Study).
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik phase iii study to confirm clinical similarity of mb09, a denosumab biosimilar, and prolia(®) in postmenopausal women with osteoporosis (simba study). konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: pharmaceutics. 2026 feb 27. Anahtar kavramlar: study, phase, iii, confirm, clinical, similarity.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41900779/

### Neurofunctional Assessments in Lumbar Spondylosis: Outcomes After Rehabilitation Treatment.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik neurofonksiyonal assessments in lomber (bel bölgesi) spondylosis: sonuçs after rehabilitasyon treatment. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of fonksiyonal morphology and kinesiology. 2026 mar 9. Anahtar kavramlar: neurofonksiyonal, assessments, lomber (bel bölgesi), spondylosis, sonuçs, after.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41900521/

### The Role of Artificial Intelligence and Professional Expertise in Adapted Physical Activity Prescription for Orthopedic Rehabilitation.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik the role of artificial intelligence and professional expertise in adapted physical activity prescription for orthopedic rehabilitasyon. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of fonksiyonal morphology and kinesiology. 2026 mar 9. Anahtar kavramlar: role, artificial, intelligence, professional, expertise, adapted.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41900520/

### The Hidden Anatomy of Low Back Pain: Uncovering the Impact of Mamillo-Accessory Ligament Ossification.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik the hidden anatomy of bel ağrısı: uncovering the impact of mamillo-accessory ligament ossification. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of fonksiyonal morphology and kinesiology. 2026 feb 27. Anahtar kavramlar: hidden, anatomy, low, back, ağrı, uncovering.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41900507/

### Estimating Lumbar Spine Foraminal Disc Measurements Using Ultrasound and X-Ray Imaging Through Advanced Image Annotation, Processing, and Mathematical Modeling During Chiropractic Traction Procedures: A Feasibility Study.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik estimating lomber (bel bölgesi) spine foraminal disc measurements using ultrasound and x-ray imaging through advanced image annotation, processing, and mathematical modeling during chiropractic traction procedures: a feasibility study. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: bioengineering (basel, switzerland). 2026 mar 12. Anahtar kavramlar: estimating, lomber (bel bölgesi), spine, foraminal, disc, measurements.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41899861/

### Impact of the Osijek Multidisciplinary Biopsychosocial Program on Chronic Low Back Pain: A Prospective Randomized Controlled Study.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik impact of the osijek multidisciplinary biopsychosocial program on chronic bel ağrısı: a prospective randomize controlled study. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: international journal of environmental research and public health. 2026 mar 11. Anahtar kavramlar: impact, osijek, multidisciplinary, biopsychosocial, program, chronic.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41899727/
